# MTDT (McWhorter-Thomasson Digital Technologies)

> We engineer high-velocity React ecosystems and immutable backend pipelines for modern innovators.

## Services
- High-Performance React Websites (Next.js)
- Headless Digital Storefronts
- Custom Web Applications (RSC, Advanced Auth, DB Scaling)
- Backend Engineering (Automated Workflows, SOC2 Compliant Architectures)

## Contact
- Founders: Matthew McWhorter, Graham Thomasson
- Email: matt@mtdigitaltech.com
- Website: https://mtdigitaltech.com
